article_title: NVIDIA Launches Omniverse DSX Blueprint to Build Physically Accurate Digital Twins of Gigawatt-Scale AI Factories

content_preview.title: NVIDIA Launches Omniverse DSX Blueprint to Build Physically Accurate Digital Twins of Gigawatt-Scale AI Factories
content_preview.summary: NVIDIA released the Omniverse DSX Blueprint at GTC 2026, a framework for building physically accurate digital twins of AI factories that unifies power, cooling, and network simulation.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
As the global buildout of AI data centers accelerates into gigawatt territory, operators face an increasingly complex engineering challenge: optimizing the interplay of power delivery, liquid cooling, network topology, and compute density before a single rack is installed. NVIDIA is betting that the answer lies in simulation, and at GTC 2026 the company released a framework designed to make AI factory digital twins an industry standard.

The [Omniverse DSX Blueprint](https://nvidianews.nvidia.co...

editor_notes.content_quality: Good digital twin/data center article with GTC 2026 context and partner ecosystem.
editor_notes.source_verification: NVIDIA Newsroom, NVIDIA Blog, and SiliconANGLE — all on allowlist or authoritative.
